title: lathyrus epetiolaris var. litoralis
intro: Lathyrus epetiolaris var. litoralis, also known as the Beach Sweet Pea, is a variety of flowering plant in the pea family that is native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Lathyrus epetiolaris var. litoralis include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried extract, allowing for various herbal preparations to be used for medicinal purposes.
